# Pull Request

## What changed

<!-- Describe what this PR does and why -->

## Type

- [ ] feat — new feature
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] db — migration or schema change
- [ ] refactor — no behavior change
- [ ] chore — tooling, deps, config

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass (`npm test`)
- [ ] No `console.log` left behind
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated (if shipping to prod)
